{{Infobox
|image_url=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PixelGuys/Cubyz/refs/heads/master/assets/cubyz/blocks/textures/sign/oak.png
|block_health=2
|rotation=sign
|tool=[[Axe]]
}}

Signs are functional blocks that are able to display text.

== Obtaining ==
Signs can be crafted with 1 plank, producing a sign of the same wood type.

== Usage ==

Signs can be placed on the floor, ceiling, and walls. If placed on the floor or ceiling, they can also be rotated in 45 degree increments.

Interacting with a sign (<code>placeBlock</code>) opens the Sign UI, where text can be inputted. Signs can display up to 4 lines of text, and support text formatting such as bold, italic, or colored text.

== History ==

* [[0.1.0]] - Palm signs are added to the game
* [[0.0.0]] - Added to the game

[[Category:Functional Blocks]]
[[Category:Blocks]]
